scripts.test:vue-matrix: pnpm --filter @affino/dialog-vue test && pnpm --filter @affino/menu-vue test && pnpm --filter @affino/popover-vue test && pnpm --filter @affino/tooltip-vue test && pnpm --filter @affino/selection-vue test && pnpm --filter @affino/treeview-vue test && pnpm --filter @affino/vue-adapter test
scripts.test:datagrid:unit: pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid-core test:unit && pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid-worker test && pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid-vue test:unit
scripts.test:e2e:critical: playwright test tests/e2e/selection.spec.ts tests/e2e/virtualization.spec.ts tests/e2e/datagrid.regression.spec.ts tests/e2e/datagrid.interactions.spec.ts tests/e2e/datagrid.tree-data.spec.ts tests/e2e/laravel-datagrid.spec.ts tests/e2e/laravel-datagrid-interactions.spec.ts tests/e2e/laravel-dialog-teleport.spec.ts tests/e2e/laravel-listbox-combobox.spec.ts tests/e2e/menu.spec.ts
scripts.test:matrix:interaction: PLAYWRIGHT_JSON_OUTPUT=playwright-report/results.json PLAYWRIGHT_FLAKE_SUMMARY=artifacts/playwright-flake-summary.json pnpm run test:e2e; E2E_STATUS=$?; node ./scripts/check-playwright-flakes.mjs; FLAKE_STATUS=$?; test $E2E_STATUS -eq 0 -a $FLAKE_STATUS -eq 0
scripts.check: pnpm run lint && pnpm run type-check && pnpm run test
scripts.quality:gates:datagrid: pnpm run test:datagrid:coverage && PLAYWRIGHT_JSON_OUTPUT=playwright-report/results.json PLAYWRIGHT_FLAKE_SUMMARY=artifacts/playwright-flake-summary.json pnpm run test:e2e:critical && node ./scripts/check-playwright-flakes.mjs
scripts.quality:gates:datagrid:tree: pnpm run test:datagrid:tree:contracts && pnpm run test:e2e:datagrid:tree && pnpm run bench:datagrid:tree:assert && pnpm run bench:datagrid:tree:matrix:assert:ci
scripts.quality:gates:datagrid:sugar: pnpm run test:datagrid:sugar:contracts && pnpm run test:e2e:datagrid:sugar
scripts.test:commercial:contracts: pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid test:unit && pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid-pro test:unit && pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid-vue test:unit -- src/__tests__/commercialEntrypoints.contract.spec.ts && pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid-laravel test:unit
scripts.release:commercial:build: pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid-core build && pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid-vue build && pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid build && pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid-pro build
scripts.release:commercial:verify: pnpm run release:commercial:build && pnpm run quality:commercial:datagrid && pnpm run release:commercial:channel:check && node ./scripts/check-datagrid-commercial-release-readiness.mjs --require-dist
scripts.release:commercial:publish: pnpm run release:commercial:publish:datagrid && pnpm run release:commercial:publish:datagrid-pro
scripts.quality:lock:datagrid: pnpm run quality:architecture:datagrid && pnpm run quality:perf:datagrid && pnpm run test:datagrid:strict-contracts && pnpm run quality:gates:datagrid && pnpm run quality:gates:datagrid:tree
scripts.quality:lock:datagrid:parity: pnpm run quality:lock:datagrid && pnpm run bench:regression && pnpm run test:e2e:datagrid:parity

scripts.bench:datagrid:worker:pressure:assert:ma: for rows in 10000 20000 50000 100000 200000; do echo "\n[worker-pressure] rows=$rows"; BENCH_WORKER_PRESSURE_ROW_COUNT=$rows BENCH_BROWSER_ROUTE=/datagrid/worker?rows=$rows BENCH_OUTPUT_JSON=artifacts/performance/worker-pressure-matrix/bench-datagrid-worker-pressure-rows-$rows.json pnpm run bench:datagrid:worker:pressure:assert; done

for sample in 10000:400 20000:800 50000:2000 100000:4000 200000:8000; do rows=${sample%%:*}; patch=${sample##*:}; echo "\n[worker-pressure-scaled] rows=$rows patchSize=$patch"; BENCH_WORKER_PRESSURE_ROW_COUNT=$rows BENCH_WORKER_PRESSURE_PATCH_SIZE=$patch BENCH_BROWSER_ROUTE=/datagrid/worker?rows=$rows BENCH_OUTPUT_JSON=artifacts/performance/worker-pressure-matrix-scaled/bench-datagrid-worker-pressure-rows-$rows-patch-$patch.json pnpm run bench:datagrid:worker:pressure:assert; done
